ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot checking a clock, mimicking the action of looking at the time.  The robot's left arm will point to the clock, while the right arm will remain relaxed at its side. The sequence will use 4 frames to show the arm motion and the final pose. Frame 1 begins with both arms at rest. Frame 2 shows the left arm beginning to move towards the clock. Frame 3 shows the left arm pointing decisively at the clock. Frame 4 shows the left arm continuing to point, with the right arm resting at its side.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready to check
left arm begins to lift and point outward
left arm extends fully, indicating the time
left arm holds the point, right arm rests
